life_paths.name: The Leader
life_paths.desc: Born to lead, Life Path 1 individuals are independent, ambitious, and determined.

life_paths.name: The Peacemaker
life_paths.desc: Gifted with sensitivity, intuition, and creativity, Life Path 2 individuals are natural harmonizers.

life_paths.name: The Creator
life_paths.desc: Life Path 3 individuals are naturally creative, expressive, and charismatic.

life_paths.name: The Builder
life_paths.desc: Life Path 4 individuals are practical, disciplined, and hardworking.

life_paths.name: The Explorer
life_paths.desc: Life Path 5 individuals are adventurous, versatile, and freedom-loving.

life_paths.name: The Nurturer
life_paths.desc: Life Path 6 individuals are compassionate, responsible, and deeply caring.

life_paths.name: The Seeker
life_paths.desc: Life Path 7 individuals are analytical, intuitive, and deeply spiritual.

life_paths.name: The Achiever
life_paths.desc: Life Path 8 individuals are ambitious, powerful, and naturally gifted in leadership.

life_paths.name: The Humanitarian
life_paths.desc: Life Path 9 individuals are compassionate, idealistic, and driven by a desire to make a positive impact on the world.

life_paths.name: The Visionary
life_paths.desc: Life Path 11 is a Master Number associated with intuition, inspiration, and spiritual insight.

life_paths.name: The Disciplined Builder
life_paths.desc: Life Path 13/4 is a Karmic Debt number that emphasizes hard work, discipline, and perseverance.

life_paths.name: The Freedom Seeker
life_paths.desc: Life Path 14/5 is a Karmic Debt number that emphasizes freedom, adaptability, and personal growth through experience.

life_paths.name: The Spiritual Seeker

life_paths.name: The Independent Leader
life_paths.desc: Life Path 19/1 is a Karmic Debt number associated with leadership, independence, and self-reliance.

life_paths.name: The Master Builder

life_paths.name: The Master Teacher

testimonials.text: "Simply incredible. The insights into my personal year cycle explained exactly what I was feeling."

content_pages.title: Terms & Conditions
content_pages.content:
Effective Date: April 19, 2026

Welcome to SEVEN – Evolve with Divine Secrets ("Company," "we," "our," or "us"). By accessing our website, purchasing our services, booking consultations, attending sessions, or using any content provided by us, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions.

If you do not agree with these Terms, please do not use our services.

1. NATURE OF SERVICES

SEVEN – Evolve with Divine Secrets provides:

  • Numerology Consultations
  • Astrology Consultations
  • Name Analysis & Name Correction Services
  • Child Birth Date & Name Analysis
  • Relationship Compatibility Analysis
  • Career Guidance
  • Business Numerology Consultation
  • Reiki Healing Sessions
  • Spiritual Guidance & Mentorship
  • Energy Balancing Recommendations
  • Other spiritual, metaphysical, wellness, and self-development services

All services are provided for informational, educational, spiritual, personal development, and entertainment purposes only.

2. NO GUARANTEE OF RESULTS

The Client acknowledges and agrees that:

  • Astrology, Numerology, Reiki, Energy Healing, and Spiritual Guidance are subjective practices.
  • Results vary from person to person.
  • No specific outcome, prediction, result, financial gain, relationship outcome, business success, health improvement, marriage, childbirth, career advancement, or spiritual achievement is guaranteed.
  • Decisions taken by the Client based on consultations are entirely at the Client's own discretion and risk.

SEVEN – Evolve with Divine Secrets makes no warranties, guarantees, or representations regarding the accuracy or realization of any prediction, recommendation, insight, guidance, or interpretation.

3. NOT MEDICAL, LEGAL, FINANCIAL OR PSYCHOLOGICAL ADVICE

Our services do not constitute:

  • Medical advice
  • Mental health treatment
  • Psychological counseling
  • Psychiatric services
  • Legal advice
  • Financial advice
  • Investment advice
  • Tax advice
  • Insurance advice

Clients must consult appropriately licensed professionals for such matters.

Under no circumstances should any guidance provided by us be used as a substitute for professional medical diagnosis, treatment, emergency care, legal counsel, or financial planning.

4. REIKI HEALING DISCLAIMER

Reiki is considered a complementary wellness practice.

Clients acknowledge that:

  • Reiki is not a replacement for medical treatment.
  • Reiki practitioners do not diagnose diseases.
  • Reiki practitioners do not prescribe medication.
  • Reiki practitioners do not perform medical procedures.
  • Reiki sessions are intended solely for relaxation, stress reduction, and spiritual well-being.

Clients should continue any prescribed medical treatment under the supervision of licensed healthcare providers.

5. CLIENT RESPONSIBILITY

The Client remains solely responsible for:

  • Personal decisions
  • Business decisions
  • Financial decisions
  • Medical decisions
  • Relationship decisions
  • Legal decisions
  • Lifestyle decisions

Any action taken following a consultation is entirely the Client's responsibility.

6. ELIGIBILITY

You must be:

  • At least 18 years of age; or
  • Using the service under the supervision and consent of a parent or legal guardian.

For services involving children, the booking must be made by a parent or legal guardian.

7. FEES AND PAYMENTS

All fees are:

  • Charged in Indian Rupees (INR)
  • Payable in advance unless otherwise agreed
  • Non-transferable
  • Subject to change without prior notice

Services shall commence only after full payment has been received.

8. REFUND POLICY

Strict No Refund Policy

Due to the personalized, intellectual, spiritual, energetic, analytical, and time-based nature of our services:

  • All payments are final.
  • No refunds shall be issued once payment is made.
  • No refunds shall be provided after a consultation has been booked.
  • No refunds shall be issued for dissatisfaction with interpretations, guidance, insights, predictions, recommendations, or outcomes.

Exceptions

Refunds may only be considered if:

  1. Payment has been duplicated due to a technical error.
  2. The Company is unable to provide the booked service.
  3. A refund is required under applicable law.

Any approved refund shall be processed within 15-30 business days.

9. RESCHEDULING POLICY

Clients may request rescheduling:

  • At least 24 hours prior to the scheduled appointment.

Failure to attend a scheduled session without prior notice may result in:

  • Session forfeiture
  • No refund
  • No rescheduling

10. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

All content including:

  • Reports
  • Name recommendations
  • Numerology charts
  • Analysis reports
  • Reiki materials
  • Audio recordings
  • Videos
  • Website content
  • Logos
  • Branding

remain the exclusive intellectual property of SEVEN – Evolve with Divine Secrets.

Clients may not:

  • Reproduce
  • Distribute
  • Publish
  • Sell
  • Modify
  • Repurpose

without prior written consent.

11. CONFIDENTIALITY

We shall make reasonable efforts to maintain confidentiality of information shared by Clients.

However, confidentiality may be disclosed where required:

  • By law
  • By court order
  • To comply with governmental authorities
  • To protect legal rights

12. PRIVACY

By using our services, you consent to the collection and processing of information necessary to provide consultations and related services.

Personal information shall not be sold to third parties.

Please refer to our Privacy Policy for further details.

13. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY

To the maximum extent permitted by law:

SEVEN – Evolve with Divine Secrets, its owner, consultants, employees, affiliates, agents, and representatives shall not be liable for:

  • Direct losses
  • Indirect losses
  • Consequential losses
  • Emotional distress
  • Financial losses
  • Business losses
  • Loss of profits
  • Loss of opportunities
  • Relationship outcomes
  • Health outcomes
  • Spiritual outcomes

arising from the use of our services.

The Client expressly agrees that all use of the services is at their own risk.

14. INDEMNIFICATION

Clients agree to indemnify and hold harmless:

SEVEN – Evolve with Divine Secrets, its owner, employees, affiliates, agents, and representatives from any claims, damages, liabilities, losses, costs, or legal expenses arising from:

  • Use of services
  • Reliance on guidance
  • Decisions taken following consultations
  • Violation of these Terms

15. FORCE MAJEURE

We shall not be liable for delays or inability to perform services due to circumstances beyond reasonable control, including:

  • Natural disasters
  • Internet failures
  • Power outages
  • Government restrictions
  • Epidemics
  • Pandemics
  • War
  • Civil unrest

16. TERMINATION OF SERVICES

We reserve the right to refuse, suspend, or terminate services if:

  • A client behaves abusively.
  • A client harasses staff.
  • Fraudulent activity is suspected.
  • Information provided is misleading or false.
  • Continued engagement is deemed inappropriate.

No refund shall be due in such circumstances.

17. GOVERNING LAW AND JURISDICTION

These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India.

Any disputes arising out of these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

18. ACCEPTANCE OF TERMS

By:

  • Booking a consultation,
  • Making a payment,
  • Accessing our website,
  • Receiving a report,
  • Participating in a session,

you confirm that:

✔ You have read these Terms & Conditions.

✔ You understand the limitations of astrology, numerology, Reiki healing, and spiritual guidance services.

✔ You voluntarily accept full responsibility for your decisions and actions.

✔ You agree to the No Refund Policy.

WEBSITE DISCLAIMER Disclaimer: Astrology, Numerology, Reiki Healing, Energy Work, and Spiritual Guidance services offered by SEVEN – Evolve with Divine Secrets are intended for spiritual, educational, personal development, and entertainment purposes only. No guarantees of outcomes or results are provided. These services do not replace medical, legal, financial, psychological, or professional advice. By using this website and our services, you acknowledge and accept full responsibility for your decisions and actions. All payments are subject to our Terms & Conditions and Refund Policy.

faqs.question: What is Astro-Numerology?
faqs.answer: Astro-Numerology is the combined study of numbers, planetary influences, names, and life vibrations. It helps uncover your strengths, challenges, opportunities, relationship patterns, career potential, business growth prospects, and life purpose.

faqs.question: How can Numerology help me?
faqs.answer:
Numerology can provide insights into:

  • Career and business decisions
  • Relationship compatibility
  • Marriage timing tendencies
  • Name correction and optimization
  • Financial growth opportunities
  • Personal strengths and weaknesses
  • Child naming and life path analysis
  • Spiritual growth and self-awareness

Numerology is a guidance tool that helps you make more informed decisions.

faqs.question: Is Numerology scientifically proven?
faqs.answer: Numerology is an ancient metaphysical science practiced for centuries across different cultures. While it is not recognized as a conventional scientific discipline, many individuals use it as a self-discovery and decision-support tool.

faqs.question: What information do I need to provide for a consultation?
faqs.answer:
Depending on the service selected, you may be required to provide:

  • Full Name
  • Date of Birth
  • Time of Birth (if available)
  • Place of Birth
  • Specific questions or areas of concern

For business consultations, incorporation dates, brand names, and business details may also be required.

faqs.question: What is Name Correction and how does it work?
faqs.answer:
Name Correction involves analyzing the vibrational value of your current name and identifying potential modifications that may better align with your birth numbers and life objectives.

The process does not change your identity—it aims to optimize the energetic and numerical resonance associated with your name.

faqs.question: Can changing my name guarantee success?
faqs.answer:
No. Success depends on multiple factors including actions, mindset, skills, effort, timing, opportunities, and circumstances.

Name alignment is intended to support your journey by creating a more harmonious energetic vibration, but no guarantees of specific outcomes are made.

faqs.question: What is included in the Birth Date & Name Analysis?
faqs.answer:
The analysis may cover:

  • Personality traits
  • Strengths and challenges
  • Life path tendencies
  • Career suitability
  • Relationship dynamics
  • Health awareness indicators
  • Financial patterns
  • Spiritual inclinations
  • Name compatibility and optimization suggestions

faqs.question: How can Business Numerology benefit my business?
faqs.answer:
Business Numerology evaluates:

  • Business name vibration
  • Brand alignment
  • Incorporation date influence
  • Growth potential
  • Leadership compatibility
  • Prosperity and stability indicators

It can help entrepreneurs make more aligned decisions regarding branding and business identity.

faqs.question: How accurate are the readings?
faqs.answer: The quality of insights depends on the information provided and the interpretation of energetic patterns. Many clients find the guidance highly relevant and transformative, though results and experiences vary from person to person.

faqs.question: What is Reiki Healing?
faqs.answer: Reiki is a holistic energy healing practice that promotes relaxation, stress reduction, emotional balance, and overall well-being through the channeling of universal life force energy.

faqs.question: Can Reiki heal diseases?
faqs.answer: Reiki is not a substitute for medical treatment and does not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. It is a complementary wellness practice intended to support relaxation and energetic balance.

faqs.question: Are online consultations as effective as in-person consultations?
faqs.answer: Yes. Numerology, spiritual guidance, and Reiki distance healing sessions can be conducted remotely. Many clients from different cities and countries successfully receive guidance online.

faqs.question: How long does a consultation take?
faqs.answer:
Consultation duration varies depending on the service selected:

  • Single Question Guidance: Usually 10–15 minutes
  • Career or Relationship Guidance: 30–60 minutes
  • Comprehensive Analysis Sessions: 60–120 minutes

Specific timelines will be communicated during booking.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency or urgent consultations?
faqs.answer: Subject to availability, priority consultations may be accommodated. Additional charges may apply for urgent requests.

faqs.question: Can I ask multiple questions during a Single Question Guidance session?
faqs.answer: The Single Question Guidance service is designed to address one specific question only. Additional questions may require a separate booking or a comprehensive consultation.

faqs.question: Is my information kept confidential?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. All personal details, consultation discussions, and reports are treated with strict confidentiality and are never shared with third parties unless required by law.

faqs.question: Do you provide remedies?
faqs.answer:
Where appropriate, recommendations may include:

  • Name alignment suggestions
  • Numerological corrections
  • Spiritual practices
  • Affirmations
  • Reiki guidance
  • Lifestyle recommendations
  • Color and number alignment guidance

All remedies are optional and should be followed at your discretion.

faqs.question: What makes SEVEN – Evolve with Divine Secrets different?
faqs.answer:
SEVEN combines:

  • ✨ Astro-Numerology Insights
  • ✨ Name Vibration Analysis
  • ✨ Business Numerology Expertise
  • ✨ Reiki Energy Healing
  • ✨ Spiritual Guidance & Mentorship
  • ✨ Practical Life Application

Our approach focuses not only on predictions but on helping individuals and businesses align with their highest potential.

faqs.question: What if I am skeptical?
faqs.answer: Healthy skepticism is welcome. Our objective is not to convince but to provide meaningful insights that you can evaluate and apply based on your own judgment and experience.

faqs.question: What is your refund policy?
faqs.answer: Due to the personalized nature of our services, all consultations, reports, analyses, and energy healing sessions are non-refundable once booked or delivered. Please review our Terms & Conditions before making a purchase.
